channel.title: Zhangli Zhou research news
channel.description: Research updates, accepted papers, code, and demo news from Zhangli Zhou.

item.title: Dual reactive planning for heterogeneous robots appears in RA-L
item.description: New work on heterogeneous robots with evolving capabilities in unknown environments is indexed by DBLP and linked with code.

item.title: T-ASE paper on local-observation reactive temporal logic planning
item.description: Human-robot planning under local observations, with the demo video linked from the homepage.

item.title: Thin and stacked object grasping paper in IEEE TAI
item.description: DHRNet plus MP-PC resources are highlighted with code and a local YouTube cover card.

item.title: Multiple temporal-logic planning papers added
item.description: ICRA, IROS, RA-L, TIE, and T-ASE records are searchable in the publications section.

item.title: Near-eye-tracking guided grasping demo linked
item.description: The video section now uses fast local covers that open YouTube in a new tab.

item.title: High-resolution grasping preprint and code connected
item.description: HRG_Net is linked from both publications and projects for easier discovery.
